identity.canonical_title: BAO Modes and Freezing (Linear Perturbation Sketch): ξ(r)

theory.canonical_statement: with oscillatory wiggles at \(k \sim k_{\rm BAO}\). Observationally, the BAO scale appears as a preferred separation scale in the two-point correlation function \(\xi(r)\) and a peak in \(P(k)\).
theory.technical_interpretation: BAO Modes and Freezing (Linear Perturbation Sketch): ξ(r) is a symbolic expression, written ξ(r). It introduces a symbol or relation used elsewhere in the framework. It is built from ξ, r. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.

formation.note: Introduced in the derivation where observationally, the BAO scale appears as a preferred separation scale in the two-point correlation function
